Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat #85 (Pokemon Promo) Details

See: Population Report
Genre: Pokemon Card
Release Date: September 28, 2023
Publisher: Pokémon
Card Number: #85
Print Run: n/a
Notes: none
  
ePID (eBay): none
TCGPlayer ID: 518861
PriceCharting ID: 5834844
   
Description: Van Gogh Pikachu Promo Card This special promotional card was released in collaboration with the Van Gogh Museum in Amsterdam. Pikachu is illustrated in the iconic style of Vincent van Gogh, inspired by his famous self-portrait, making this card a unique crossover between fine art and the Pokémon Trading Card Game. Due to its limited distribution and strong global demand, the Van Gogh Pikachu has become one of the most iconic modern Pokémon promo cards.

More Photos: Pokemon Promo: Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat #85

Pikachu with Grey Felt Hat #85 (Pokemon Promo | Pokemon Cards) prices are based on the historic sales. The prices shown are calculated using our proprietary algorithm.
Historic sales data are completed sales with a buyer and a seller agreeing on a price. We do not factor unsold items into our prices.
